title: Hull Damage Under Fire
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM HullDamage WHERE Health < 0.5 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {count} hull damage event(s) with structural integrity below 50% recorded during the report period. Below 50% hull health, module damage from penetrating hits becomes increasingly likely, and at 0% the ship is destroyed and trigger the insurance rebuy process.
details.help: HullDamage.Health is a fraction (0.0–1.0). Health < 0.5 means the hull dropped below half — a genuinely dangerous threshold.

tagLines: Structural integrity breach events below 50% threshold logged. Insurance actuaries have been notified.
Below 50% hull health. That's the part where most pilots start reconsidering their choices.
Hull dropping below half is the galaxy's reminder that your ship is not immortal. Neither are you.
